news.t: AVANTIS INVESTORS® EXPANDS ETF OFFERING WITH LAUNCH OF AVANTIS U.S. QUALITY ETF

holdings.infoBox: AVUQ is an equity ETF with a total of 608 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.04%, Apple at 10.43%, Microsoft at 6.34%, Amazon.com at 5.31%, and Alphabet at 3.78%.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S. Quality ETF Shs Avantis US Growth Equity ETF (AVUQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in high-quality US large-cap equities. The adviser selects and weights holdings based on fundamentals. AVUQ was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: AVANTIS INVESTORS® EXPANDS ETF OFFERING WITH LAUNCH OF AVANTIS U.S. QUALITY ETF
data.text: KANSAS CITY, Mo. , March 27, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Avantis Investors®, a $57 billion* investment offering from the $260 billion** global asset manager American Century Investments®, announces an expans...
